LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TOGAST, LLC MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COURT RULED ON THE EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS AS FOLLOWS: AS TO THE LOCONTE DECLARATION: OBJECTIONS OVERRULED EXCEPT AS TO - PARAGRAPH 2, PARAGRAPH 21 SENTENCE BEGINNING AT LINE 9 AND ENDING AT BEGINNING OF LINE 10, PARAGRAPH 27 LINE 13 BEGINNING WITH "IN THE EVENT THRU LINE 15, & AS TO THE SACKS DECLARATION, PARAGRAPH 28. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FINAL - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. EVEN IF PLAINTIFF WERE TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS, MONEY DAMAGES PROVIDE AN ADEQUATE REMEDY. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF TOGAST, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADMITTING COUNSEL IRA S. SACKS AS COUNSEL, PRO HAC VICE.

APPEARANCES: Ira S. Sacks, Esq. of Akerman Senterfitt LLP 212/880-3827 & Salle E. Yoo, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP 276-6564 for pltf & moving party; Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, Esq. 773-5917 & Eric Hairston, Esq. 773-5617 of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP for deft.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal;
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF TOGAST, LLC'S MOTION TO SEAL (FILED ON JUL-11-2011): 1. EXHIBITS D AND E TO THE DECLARATION OF IRA S. SACKS IN SUPPORT OF THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION; 2. PARAGRAPHS 19-21 OF THE DECLARATION OF IRA S. SACKS; 3. PARAGRAPHS 8-10 OF THE AFFIDAVIT OF ANTHONY LOCONTE.

APPEARANCES: Ira S. Sacks, Esq. of Akerman Senterfitt LLP 212/880-3827 & Salle E. Yoo, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP 276-6564 for pltf & moving party; Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, Esq. 773-5917 & Eric Hairston, Esq. 773-5617 of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP for deft.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Seal; Declaration;Pos; Declaration Of Anthony Siniscalchi In Support Of Togast,Llc Motion For Preliminary Injunction; Declaration Of Gavriel Sakaff;Response To Defts Evidentiary Objections And Motion To Strike; (**Reply Declaration Of Ira S. Sacks In Support Of Togast, Llc'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction (Under Seal)**)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF TOGAST, LLC'S MOTION TO SEAL (FILED ON JUL-27-2011): ATTACHMENTS TO EXHIBIT A TO THE REPLY DECLARATION OF IRA S. SACKS IN SUPPORT OF TOGAST, LLC'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Ira S. Sacks, Esq. of Akerman Senterfitt LLP 212/880-3827 & Salle E. Yoo, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP 276-6564 for pltf & moving party; Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, Esq. 773-5917 & Eric Hairston, Esq. 773-5617 of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP for deft.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed (one order on both motions to seal). (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction;
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF TOGAST, LLC MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Ira S. Sacks, Esq. of Akerman Senterfitt LLP 212/880-3827 & Salle E. Yoo, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP 276-6564 for pltf & moving party; Karen G. Johnson-McKewan, Esq. 773-5917 & Eric Hairston, Esq. 773-5617 of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
Court ruled on the evidentiary objections as follows: As to the LoConte declaration: objections overruled except as to - paragraph 2, paragraph 21 sentence beginning at line 9 and ending at beginning of line 10, paragraph 27 line 13 beginning with "In the event thru line 15, & as to the Sacks declaration, paragraph 28.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted as final - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN A LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. EVEN IF PLAINTIFF WERE TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS, MONEY DAMAGES PROVIDE AN ADEQUATE REMEDY. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
